ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ١
ayahs.translation: The Most Merciful

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلَّمَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ ٢
ayahs.translation: Taught the Qur’ān,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ ٣
ayahs.translation: Created man,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلَّمَهُ ٱلْبَيَانَ ٤
ayahs.translation: [And] taught him eloquence.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ بِحُسْبَانٍ ٥
ayahs.translation: The sun and the moon [move] by precise calculation,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلنَّجْمُ وَٱلشَّجَرُ يَسْجُدَانِ ٦
ayahs.translation: And the stars and trees prostrate.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ رَفَعَهَا وَوَضَعَ ٱلْمِيزَانَ ٧
ayahs.translation: And the heaven He raised and imposed the balance

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَّا تَطْغَوْاْ فِى ٱلْمِيزَانِ ٨
ayahs.translation: That you not transgress within the balance.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلْوَزْنَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَلَا تُخْسِرُوا۟ ٱلْمِيزَانَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلْوَزْنَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَلَا تُخْسِرُواْ ٱلْمِيزَانَ ٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاَقِيۡمُوا الۡوَزۡنَ بِالۡقِسۡطِ وَلَا تُخۡسِرُوا الۡمِيۡزَانَ‏
ayahs.translation: And establish weight in justice and do not make deficient the balance.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-aqeemul wazna bilqisti Wa-laa tukhsirul meezaan

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلْأَنَامِ ١٠
ayahs.translation: And the earth He laid [out] for the creatures.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَٱلنَّخْلُ ذَاتُ ٱلْأَكْمَامِ ١١
ayahs.translation: Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْحَبُّ ذُو ٱلْعَصْفِ وَٱلرَّيْحَانُ ١٢
ayahs.translation: And grain having husks and scented plants.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ١٣
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ كَٱلْفَخَّارِ ١٤
ayahs.translation: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ ١٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَخَلَقَ الۡجَآنَّ مِنۡ مَّارِجٍ مِّنۡ نَّارٍ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-khalaqal jaaan mim maarijim min naar

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ١٦
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَغْرِبَيْنِ ١٧
ayahs.translation: [He is] Lord of the two sunrises and Lord of the two sunsets.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ١٨
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ ١٩
ayahs.translation: He released the two seas, meeting [one another];

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَّا يَبْغِيَانِ ٢٠
ayahs.translation: Between them is a barrier so neither of them transgresses.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٢١
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَخْرُجُ مِنْهُمَا ٱللُّؤْلُؤُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ ٢٢
ayahs.translation: From both of them emerge pearl and coral.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَهُ ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَـٰمِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَهُ ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْمُنشَـَٔـاتُ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَـٰمِ ٢٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَهُ الۡجَوَارِ الۡمُنۡشَئٰتُ فِى الۡبَحۡرِ كَالۡاَعۡلَامِ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And to Him belong the ships [with sails] elevated in the sea like mountains.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-lahul jawaaril mun-sha'aatu fil bahri kal-a'laam

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٢٥
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كُلُّ مَنْ عَلَيْهَا فَانٍ ٢٦
ayahs.translation: Everyone upon it [i.e., the earth] will perish,

ayahs.textUthmani: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ ٢٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّيَبۡقٰى وَجۡهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو الۡجَلٰلِ وَالۡاِكۡرَامِ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-yabqaa wajhu rabbika thul jalaali wal-ikraam

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٢٨
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmani: يَسْـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَسْــَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٲتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ‌ۚ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍ ٢٩
ayahs.textIndopak: يَسۡـَٔـلُهٗ مَنۡ فِى السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ​ؕ كُلَّ يَوۡمٍ هُوَ فِىۡ شَاۡنٍ​ۚ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Whoever is within the heavens and earth asks Him; every day He is in [i.e., bringing about] a matter.
ayahs.transliteration: Yas'aluhoo man fis samaawaati walard; kulla yawmin huwa fee shaan

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٣٠
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَنَفْرُغُ لَكُمْ أَيُّهَ ٱلثَّقَلَانِ ٣١
ayahs.translation: We will attend to you, O prominent beings.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٣٢
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmani: يَـٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ ۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَـٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُواْ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٲتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُواْ‌ۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ ٣٣
ayahs.textIndopak: يٰمَعۡشَرَ الۡجِنِّ وَالۡاِنۡسِ اِنِ اسۡتَطَعۡتُمۡ اَنۡ تَنۡفُذُوۡا مِنۡ اَقۡطَارِ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ فَانْفُذُوۡا​ؕ لَا تَنۡفُذُوۡنَ اِلَّا بِسُلۡطٰنٍ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allāh].
ayahs.transliteration: Yaa-ma'sharal jinni wal-insi inis tata'tum an tanfuthoo min aqtaaris samaawaati wal-ardi fanfuthoo; laa tanfuthoona illaa bisultaan

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٣٤
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmani: يُرْسَلُ عَلَيْكُمَا شُوَاظٌ مِّن نَّارٍ وَنُحَاسٌ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يُرْسَلُ عَلَيْكُمَا شُوَاظٌ مِّن نَّارٍ وَنُحَاسٌ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ ٣٥
ayahs.textIndopak: يُرۡسَلُ عَلَيۡكُمَا شُوَاظٌ مِّنۡ نَّارٍ ۙ وَّنُحَاسٌ فَلَا تَنۡتَصِرٰنِ​ۚ‏ ﻿﻿

words.translation: you will (be able to) defend yourselves

ayahs.translation: There will be sent upon you a flame of fire and smoke, and you will not defend yourselves.
ayahs.transliteration: Yursalu 'alaikumaa shuwaazum min naarinw-wa nuhaasun falaa tantasiraan

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٣٦
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmani: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ وَرْدَةً كَٱلدِّهَانِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ وَرْدَةً كَٱلدِّهَانِ ٣٧
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاِذَا انْشَقَّتِ السَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتۡ وَرۡدَةً كَالدِّهَانِ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And when the heaven is split open and becomes rose-colored like oil -
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-ithan shaqqatis samaaa'u fakaanat wardatan kaddihaan

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٣٨
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

ayahs.textUthmani: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسْـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسْــَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌ وَلَا جَآنٌّ ٣٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَيَوۡمَٮِٕذٍ لَّا يُسۡـَٔـلُ عَنۡ ذَنۡۢبِهٖۤ اِنۡسٌ وَّلَا جَآنٌّ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Then on that Day none will be asked about his sin among men or jinn.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-yawma'ithil laa yus'alu 'an thambiheee insunw Wa-laa jaann

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٤٠
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmani: يُعْرَفُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسِيمَـٰهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِى وَٱلْأَقْدَامِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يُعْرَفُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسِيمَـٰهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٲصِى وَٱلْأَقْدَامِ ٤١
ayahs.textIndopak: يُعۡرَفُ الۡمُجۡرِمُوۡنَ بِسِيۡمٰهُمۡ فَيُؤۡخَذُ بِالنَّوَاصِىۡ وَ الۡاَقۡدَامِ​ۚ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: The criminals will be known by their marks, and they will be seized by the forelocks and the feet.
ayahs.transliteration: Yu'raful mujrimoona biseemaahum fa'yu'khathu binna-waasi wal-aqdaam

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٤٢
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmani: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ ٤٣
ayahs.textIndopak: هٰذِهٖ جَهَنَّمُ الَّتِىۡ يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا الۡمُجۡرِمُوۡنَ​ۘ‏
ayahs.translation: This is Hell, which the criminals deny.
ayahs.transliteration: Haathihee jahannamul latee yukaththibu bihal mujrimoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَطُوفُونَ بَيْنَهَا وَبَيْنَ حَمِيمٍ ءَانٍ ٤٤
ayahs.translation: They will circulate between it and scalding water, heated [to the utmost degree].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٤٥
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلِمَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ جَنَّتَانِ ٤٦
ayahs.translation: But for he who has feared the position of his Lord are two gardens -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٤٧
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ذَوَاتَآ أَفْنَانٍ ٤٨
ayahs.translation: Having [spreading] branches.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٤٩
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ تَجْرِيَانِ ٥٠
ayahs.translation: In both of them are two springs, flowing.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٥١
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِيهِمَا مِن كُلِّ فَـٰكِهَةٍ زَوْجَانِ ٥٢
ayahs.translation: In both of them are of every fruit, two kinds.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٥٣
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmani: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍ ۚ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مُتَّكِــِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشِۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍ‌ۚ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍ ٥٤
ayahs.textIndopak: مُتَّكِـــِٕيۡنَ عَلٰى فُرُشٍۢ بَطَآٮِٕنُهَا مِنۡ اِسۡتَبۡرَقٍ​ؕ وَجَنَی الۡجَـنَّتَيۡنِ دَانٍ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: [They are] reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade, and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low.
ayahs.transliteration: Muttaki'eena 'alaa furushim bataaa'inuhaa min istabraq; wajanal jannataini daan

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٥٥
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmani: فِيهِنَّ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِيهِنَّ قَـٰصِرَٲتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ ٥٦
ayahs.textIndopak: فِيۡهِنَّ قٰصِرٰتُ الطَّرۡفِۙ لَمۡ يَطۡمِثۡهُنَّ اِنۡسٌ قَبۡلَهُمۡ وَلَا جَآنٌّ​ۚ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: In them are women limiting [their] glances, untouched before them by man or jinnī -
ayahs.transliteration: Feehinna qaasiratut tarfi lam yatmishunna insun qablahum Wa-laa jaaann

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٥٧
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَأَنَّهُنَّ ٱلْيَاقُوتُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ ٥٨
ayahs.translation: As if they were rubies and coral.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٥٩
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَلْ جَزَآءُ ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنِ إِلَّا ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنُ ٦٠
ayahs.translation: Is the reward for good [anything] but good?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٦١
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمِن دُونِهِمَا جَنَّتَانِ ٦٢
ayahs.translation: And below them both [in excellence] are two [other] gardens -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٦٣
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مُدْهَآمَّتَانِ ٦٤
ayahs.translation: Dark green [in color].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٦٥
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ نَضَّاخَتَانِ ٦٦
ayahs.translation: In both of them are two springs, spouting.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٦٧
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِيهِمَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَنَخْلٌ وَرُمَّانٌ ٦٨
ayahs.translation: In both of them are fruit and palm trees and pomegranates.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٦٩
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِيهِنَّ خَيْرَٲتٌ حِسَانٌ ٧٠
ayahs.translation: In them are good and beautiful women -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٧١
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: حُورٌ مَّقْصُورَٲتٌ فِى ٱلْخِيَامِ ٧٢
ayahs.translation: Fair ones reserved in pavilions -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٧٣
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

ayahs.textUthmani: لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ ٧٤
ayahs.textIndopak: لَمۡ يَطۡمِثۡهُنَّ اِنۡسٌ قَبۡلَهُمۡ وَلَا جَآنٌّ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Untouched before them by man or jinnī -
ayahs.transliteration: Lam yatmis-hunna insun qablahum Wa-laa jaaann

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٧٥
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

ayahs.textUthmani: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفْرَفٍ خُضْرٍ وَعَبْقَرِىٍّ حِسَانٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مُتَّكِــِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفْرَفٍ خُضْرٍ وَعَبْقَرِىٍّ حِسَانٍ ٧٦
ayahs.textIndopak: مُتَّكِــِٕيۡنَ عَلٰى رَفۡرَفٍ خُضۡرٍ وَّعَبۡقَرِىٍّ حِسَانٍ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Reclining on green cushions and beautiful fine carpets.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ ٧٧
ayahs.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

ayahs.textUthmani: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ ٧٨
ayahs.textIndopak: تَبٰـرَكَ اسۡمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى الۡجَـلٰلِ وَالۡاِكۡرَامِ‏
ayahs.translation: Blessed is the name of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
ayahs.transliteration: Tabaarak asmu Rabbika Thil Jalaali wal-Ikraam
